title: Read-only evaluation sandbox
stakeholder_intent: The evaluation sandbox must use a read-only filesystem. The job cannot modify any files.
formalized_policy: The root filesystem is mounted read-only. Writes are allowed to /tmp for scratch space.
implementation_claim: The container mounts / read-only and grants a writable tmpfs at /tmp.
expected_issue: The stakeholder intent states a read-only filesystem with no file modification, but the policy and implementation permit writes to /tmp. The constraint is weakened.
